bind-pdf-form-autofiller.title: Bind PDF Form to Autofiller
bind-pdf-form-autofiller.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF form file to an Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Autofiller instance using a file path.

generate-datatable-from-xlsx.title: Generate DataTable from XLSX and Fill PDF Form
generate-datatable-from-xlsx.description: Loads an XLSX worksheet, creates a DataTable using the first row as column headers, and maps the data to a PDF form.

import-datatable-autofiller.title: Import DataTable into AutoFiller for AcroForm Mapping
import-datatable-autofiller.description: Demonstrates how to fill AcroForm fields by importing a populated DataTable into Aspose.Pdf AutoFiller.

save-filled-pdf.title: Save Filled PDF While Preserving Layout
save-filled-pdf.description: Loads a PDF, optionally modifies it, and saves it to a new file while preserving the original layout.

verify-pdf-page-count.title: Verify PDF Page Count Matches DataTable Rows
verify-pdf-page-count.description: Creates a PDF where each DataTable row is placed on a separate page and checks that the number of pages equals the number of rows.

map-datatable-columns-to-pdf-fields.title: Map DataTable Columns to PDF Field Names and Fill PDF
map-datatable-columns-to-pdf-fields.description: Demonstrates renaming DataTable columns to match PDF form field identifiers before using AutoFiller to populate a PDF template.

fill-pdf-from-multiple-excel-worksheets.title: Fill PDF Template from Multiple Excel Worksheets using AutoFiller
fill-pdf-from-multiple-excel-worksheets.description: Reads each worksheet of an Excel file into a DataTable and uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to generate a separate PDF for each sheet based on a template.

fill-pdf-form-with-autofiller.title: Fill PDF Form Fields with AutoFiller and Handle Errors
fill-pdf-form-with-autofiller.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to fill form fields while capturing missing field warnings and file‑related exceptions.

dispose-autofiller.title: Dispose AutoFiller after Filling PDF Form
dispose-autofiller.description: Shows how to fill a PDF form using AutoFiller and properly dispose the object to release unmanaged resources.

batch-fill-pdf-template.title: Batch Fill PDF Template with Multiple DataTables
batch-fill-pdf-template.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to fill a PDF form repeatedly for several DataTable data sets, generating separate PDF files for each record.

excel-to-pdf-table.title: Export Excel Worksheet to DataTable, Filter Rows, and Generate PDF Table
excel-to-pdf-table.description: Demonstrates reading an XLSX worksheet into a DataTable, filtering rows based on a condition, and importing the filtered data into a PDF table.

generate-pdfs-custom-filenames.title: Generate PDFs with Custom Filenames from DataTable
generate-pdfs-custom-filenames.description: Creates a PDF for each DataTable row, fills matching form fields, and saves each file using a name derived from a column value.

validate-pdf-form-fields.title: Validate Required PDF Form Fields Against DataTable Columns
validate-pdf-form-fields.description: Demonstrates how to ensure every required form field in a PDF has a matching column in a DataTable before importing data.

log-datatable-rows-to-pdf.title: Log DataTable Rows and Page Numbers while Creating PDF
log-datatable-rows-to-pdf.description: Shows how to iterate through a DataTable, create a PDF page for each row, add the data to a table, and log the processed row together with the generated page number.

apply-pdf-password.title: Apply Password Protection to PDF
apply-pdf-password.description: Creates a PDF, saves it, then encrypts the file with a user and owner password using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity.

merge-filled-pdfs.title: Merge Multiple Filled PDFs into a Single Document
merge-filled-pdfs.description: Demonstrates filling a template PDF with data from several DataTables using AutoFiller, saving each filled PDF, and then merging them into one consolidated PDF file.

pdf-to-byte-array.title: Convert PDF to Byte Array for Web API Transmission
pdf-to-byte-array.description: Loads a filled PDF file and converts it to a byte array using a memory stream, suitable for sending over a web API without writing to disk.

async-read-xlsx-write-pdf.title: Asynchronously Read XLSX and Write PDF with Aspose.Pdf
async-read-xlsx-write-pdf.description: Demonstrates reading an XLSX file asynchronously and creating a PDF document, then writing the PDF to disk asynchronously using Aspose.Pdf.

compare-pdf-form-fields.title: Compare PDF Form Fields with DataTable
compare-pdf-form-fields.description: Unit test that fills a PDF form from a DataTable and verifies the filled values match the original data.

autofiller-retry-import.title: AutoFiller Import with Retry on Transient File Access Errors
autofiller-retry-import.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.AutoFiller to bind a template PDF, import data, and save the result while retrying on transient file access exceptions.

pdf-page-summary-report.title: Generate Summary Report of PDF Pages and DataTable Row Identifiers
pdf-page-summary-report.description: Extracts tables from each PDF page, reads an identifier from the first cell, matches it against a DataTable, and writes a CSV‑style summary listing page numbers and the corresponding row identifiers.

auto-filler-date-header.title: Add Current Date Header to AutoFiller Generated PDF
auto-filler-date-header.description: Shows how to bind a template with AutoFiller and add a header displaying the current date on each generated page.

excel-to-pdf-form-mapping.title: Map Excel Columns to PDF Form Fields Using a Configuration File
excel-to-pdf-form-mapping.description: Demonstrates reading a JSON mapping file and a CSV export, then dynamically filling a PDF form's fields based on the mapping for each data row.

stream-xlsx-to-autofiller.title: Stream Large XLSX Data into AutoFiller to Generate Merged PDF
stream-xlsx-to-autofiller.description: Demonstrates reading a large XLSX file row‑by‑row and feeding each row as a small DataTable to Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller, avoiding loading the entire sheet into memory.

validate-pdf-size-after-autofill.title: Validate PDF Size After AutoFilling DataTable
validate-pdf-size-after-autofill.description: Fills a PDF template using AutoFiller with a DataTable, saves the result, and checks that the file size does not exceed a predefined limit.

fill-pdf-from-excel.title: Fill PDF Template from Uploaded Excel using AutoFiller
fill-pdf-from-excel.description: Demonstrates an ASP.NET Core controller that receives an XLSX file, reads its data into a DataTable, and uses Aspose.Pdf.AutoFiller to populate a PDF template and return the filled PDF.

fill-pdf-form-with-cancellation.title: Fill PDF Form with Timeout Cancellation
fill-pdf-form-with-cancellation.description: Demonstrates how to fill a PDF form and abort the operation if it exceeds a specified timeout using a CancellationToken.

populate-pdf-form-fields-numeric-format.title: Populate PDF Form Fields from DataTable with Numeric Formatting
populate-pdf-form-fields-numeric-format.description: Shows how to format numeric values in a DataTable before using AutoFiller to fill PDF form fields.

add-watermark-after-form-filling.title: Add Watermark to PDF Pages After Form Filling
add-watermark-after-form-filling.description: Demonstrates adding a watermark to each page of a PDF after form filling using PdfFileStamp.

split-pdf-into-single-pages.title: Split PDF into Single-Page Files
split-pdf-into-single-pages.description: Demonstrates how to split a filled PDF into separate one-page PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

fill-pdf-form-from-excel.title: Fill PDF Form Using Data from Excel
fill-pdf-form-from-excel.description: Loads a PDF form and an Excel file, fills the form fields with the Excel data, and saves the result as a new PDF.
